programmes.show_description: Guy chats to Thomas White of White Magic for Lovers and the Electric Soft Parade.
Soundtrack the early hours with back to back music, plus exclusive BBC sessions.
Emily Pilbeam presents a mixtape of her personal selection of tracks from BBC Introducing, including a new Track of the Week by Max Winter.
Chris kickstarts your week with the music you love. Plus there's a brand new 5 Before 6 DJ.
Nick hears about literary and arts festival The Laugharne Weekend in West Wales. Also, Nick has the Cloudbusting mix - an hour of uplifting music to bring out the sunshine.
Lauren welcomes you to a brand new week with uplifting tunes.
Musician, producer and educator Jacob Collier joins Craig to talk about his latest record 'The Light For Days', working with Quincy Jones, and illegal chords!
Showcasing the very best of what Steve's listening to and supporting right now.
Nathan Shepherd and Deb Grant hand-pick and share their latest new music obsessions.
Gideon Coe hooks up with musician Andrew Wasylyk via our Glasgow studio - ain't technology great.
Kelly Lee Owens picks some of her favourite Welsh electronic music, including music from Aphex Twin, Overmono and Underworld.
Courtney Love in conversation with Jo Whiley, Lauren Laverne & Simon Mayo from the archive.

programmes.show_name: The First Time with Courtney Love
programmes.show_description: Courtney Love shares her musical milestones with Matt Everitt in a programme first broadcast in 2014.
As part of the Courtney Love Artist Collection another chance to hear a documentary reflecting the post punk era in Liverpool key to her formative years in the early 1980's.
Karla Chubb of Sprints presents a Courtney Love playlist featuring both material by Hole and solo efforts and reflecting her enduring influence.
The biggest tunes to start the day, your chance to vote on a 'Lost Love', plus will your track get a spin on the wheel?
Wonderful music to start your day, including the Cloudbusting mix to banish the grey skies.
James Blake joins ahead of the release of new album, Trying Times.
Ahead of their sold-out show at Ally Pally, Viagra Boys and Getdown Services put their music tastes to the test in a 6 Music Fight Club! Who wins? You decide!
Professor Sophie Daniels looks delves deep into Gorillaz's creative family tree in this weeks 6 Musicology, and Aurora takes part in this week's 'Song I Wish I'd Written'.
Nathan Shepherd and Deb Grant hand-pick and share their latest new music obsessions.
Gideon Coe plays his music loves from every era and genre.
A deep dive into the mind of an artist.
